title: Defender Security U 11316 Swing Bar Door Guard with High Security Auxiliary Lock, Satin Nickel, 1 Pack
features: SWING BAR DOOR GUARD – The Defender Security U 11316 Swing Bar Door Guard, with a satin nickel finish, will increase peace of mind when answering the door by allowing the door to be cracked open slightly for viewing.

ADDITIONAL HOME SECURITY – Add security to your entry door and help prevent forced entry. When engaged, a ball on the keeper interlocks with the bar lock and prevents an intruder from pushing their way through.
THUMB TURN LOCK – The additional thumb turn security lock blocks the release tool from disengaging the door guard latch.
EASY INSTALLATION – Installation is quick and easy, and all fasteners are included – extra security and peace of mind can be achieved in just minutes!
EMERGENCY BREAKAWAY – In case of emergency, the thumb turn will breakaway with approximately 100 lbs. of force.
description: This Defender Security U 11316 Swing Bar Door Guard will increase peace of mind when answering the door by allowing the door to be cracked open slightly for viewing. When engaged, a ball on the keeper interlocks with the bar lock and prevents an intruder from pushing their way through. We have improved upon the standard door guard design and added an innovative backup thumb turn security lock that blocks the release tool from disengaging the door guard latch. In cases of emergency, hotel security or emergency crews can pop the thumb turn off of the unit by applying approximately 100 pounds of force to the door. (Note that 100 pounds of force is much greater than a simple kick in, so the emergency release feature does not compromise your security.) Additionally, after the thumb turn lock breaks away, the unit still operates as a traditional swing bar door lock and a specially designed Anti-Lockout emergency access tool is required to swing the door guard out of place. To help prevent forced entry into your home, it is always a good idea to engage the backup thumb turn lock whenever you are not actively using your door.
